code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD harmony_of_blows[Infra_EtcdCluster] click harmony_of_blows callback " Harmony of Blows

Cost: 8 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Extra Action
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The patterns and flows of a battlefield hold no mysteries for the character. She does not need to improvise last-second defenses. She notices openings well before they appear. She can choose her blows precisely, selecting multiple actions that combine harmoniously. In the turn in which she invokes this Charm, the character can take two extra attack actions, using Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm.
This Charm is explicitly permitted to be in a Combo with Charms of other Abilities. Note that the rules on Combos may limit the kinds of actions a character can take. " meditation_on_war[Infra_LoadBalancer] harmony_of_blows --> meditation_on_war click meditation_on_war callback " Meditation on War

Cost: 1 mote per die + 1 mote per dice pool penalty cancelled
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Calm and precision envelops the character as she strikes. She adds dice to one Melee attack, increasing it to a maximum of its normal pool plus the character's Essence. For example, an Essence 3 character who has a - 1 wound penalty can spend up to 4 motes to enhance her attack. This can overcome penalties that reduce the character's dice pool to 0 before Charms. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm. " orchestration_of_conflict[Infra_IngressController] harmony_of_blows --> orchestration_of_conflict click orchestration_of_conflict callback " Orchestration of Conflict

Cost: 2 motes per target number reduction
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Manipulating the local flow of a conflict through the ripple effects of her own actions, the character reduces the target number for a Melee attack or parry. " impeding_the_flow[Infra_WorkerNode] click impeding_the_flow callback " Impeding the Flow

Cost: 3 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

A wind full of red stardust and the character's will, visible to those who can see dematerialized spirits, spins around the character. It reroutes the flows of Essence and fate that normally allow others to attack her. A casual movement of the Exalt's weapon parries any one incoming attack she is aware of, so long as the attack has a physical component and is not specifically noted as impossible to block. This is not a perfect defense. " serenity_in_blood[Infra_WorkerNode] harmony_of_blows --> serenity_in_blood impeding_the_flow --> serenity_in_blood click serenity_in_blood callback " Serenity in Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows, Impeding the Flow

Stirring the currents of fate with the tip of her weapon, the character disrupts the path of any attack made against her, so long as it passes through any portion of the world bound by fate. If she is unaware of the attack, her player must make a reflexive Perception + Melee roll at difficulty 3 to divert the blow. Otherwise, this is a perfect block, capable of stopping even unblockable attacks. " smiling_at_the_damned[Infra_EtcdCluster] click smiling_at_the_damned callback " Smiling at the Damned

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: None

In the moment the character's weapon strikes true, the colors around her take on a harsh red tinge. Essence dissolves at the weapon's touch. Halve the raw damage for one attack, rounding down, but the damage is aggravated. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Conviction with this Charm. " perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior[Infra_IngressController] meditation_on_war --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior orchestration_of_conflict --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior serenity_in_blood --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior smiling_at_the_damned --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior click perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior callback " Perfection of the Visionary Warrior

Cost: 10 motes, 1 Willpower, 1 health level
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Melee: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Meditation on War, Orchestration of Conflict, Serenity in Blood, Smiling at the Damned

This Charm uses a prayer strip marked with the scripture of the Maiden on the Shelf. The character places it across his eyes, whereupon it adheres and begins to drip with dark blood. The character suffers no visibility penalties. All opponents and attacks become apparent to him, although effects such as the Mental Invisibility Technique can force him to ignore them. He sees enemies not as bodies and faces but as patterns of fate and potential or — for creatures outside of fate — disruptions in such patterns. The character can reflexively parry any blockable attack with his full Dexterity + Melee dice pool. Once per turn, after his initiative, he can reflexively make an Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown attack at his full dice pool. He cannot use the latter ability in any turn where he splits his normal dice pool. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为这套近战Charm体系建一个清晰的流程图。核心起点是「Harmony of Blows」，它让玩家在回合内获得两次额外攻击动作，可以搭配Archery、Brawl、Melee或Thrown使用。
明白，这是一个Extra Action类型的Charm。我注意到它允许跨能力Combo，这在规则里比较特殊。那它的前置条件呢？
前置条件是None，Minimum Melee 2、Essence 2即可。从Harmony of Blows应该分出两条支线：一条走向「Meditation on War」，另一条走向「Orchestration of Conflict」。
好的，我已经把Harmony of Blows作为根节点，向下连接了Meditation on War和Orchestration of Conflict。Meditation on War是Supplemental类型，可以克服骰池惩罚对吧？
没错，Cost是1 mote per die，能把攻击骰加到正常池+Essence上限。Orchestration of Conflict则是降低目标数字，2 motes per target number reduction。现在还需要一个独立入口「Impeding the Flow」。
Impeding the Flow也是前置None？我确认一下，它描述的是用武器动作偏转任何有物理成分的攻击，但不是完美防御。
对，Minimum Melee 2、Essence 1，Reflexive类型。关键是从Harmony of Blows和Impeding the Flow都要汇聚到「Serenity in Blood」——这是一个需要双前置的节点。
双前置结构已建立。Serenity in Blood的Cost是5 motes加1 Willpower，可以阻挡unblockable攻击，是完美防御。我注意到还有一个独立节点「Smiling at the Damned」？
是的，Smiling at the Damned也是无前置，Minimum Melee 4、Essence 3。它把伤害减半但转为aggravated，Sidereal可以用Conviction驱动。这个节点和前面三个进阶节点最终都要汇入顶端能力。
顶端能力是「Perfection of the Visionary Warrior」？它需要四个前置：Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict、Serenity in Blood，还有Smiling at the Damned？
完全正确。这是整个体系的顶点，Cost很高：10 motes、1 Willpower、1 health level，持续一整个场景。角色可以无visibility penalty地感知所有攻击，甚至看穿Mental Invisibility Technique的伪装。
四入一的结构已完成。我注意到描述中提到角色看到的不是bodies and faces，而是patterns of fate and potential，这对理解这个Charm的视觉表现很重要。
还有一点：Perfection of the Visionary Warrior允许每回合在自己的initiative之后，用完整骰池做一次Archery、Brawl、Melee或Thrown的反射攻击，但不能和split pool的回合叠加。
这和Harmony of Blows的extra action形成呼应——一个是回合内多动，一个是场景级被动加反射攻击。整个体系的视觉结构应该是：底层两个入口，中层三个分支，顶层一个汇聚点。
对，而且要注意Serenity in Blood虽然需要双前置，但它本身也是完美防御，和Impeding the Flow的非完美防御形成升级关系。所有节点的click回调都要保留完整的规则文本。
所有节点的callback内容已填充完毕。最后确认一下：Harmony of Blows和Smiling at the Damned都是无前置，但后者要求更高的Melee和Essence，这个层级差异在图中通过节点位置体现。
等等，Smiling at the Damned的节点类型我刚才说错了——它应该是独立的入口，不是从Harmony of Blows分出来的。让我修正一下：它和Harmony of Blows、Impeding the Flow一样都是根级节点，只是各自走向不同。

已修正。现在结构清晰了：三个根节点（Harmony of Blows、Impeding the Flow、Smiling at the Damned），Harmony of Blows向下分出Meditation on War和Orchestration of Conflict，与Impeding the Flow共同汇入Serenity in Blood，最终四线汇聚于Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。
